compiled_state.author: RebarBotNava
compiled_state.description:
## Why
Entering beta is the cheapest window to retire deprecated user-facing surface before a larger user base depends on it. Beyond the 7 registry-catalogued aliases (handled by the sibling "Remove deprecated aliases pre-beta" story), the pre-beta sweep found additional user-facing deprecations that should retire in the same clean break. Pre-1.0, so semver-permissible; still breaking for external consumers.

Citations:
- lib+MCP+CLI `list_epics` family: `__init__.py:1056-1090` (lib, warns), `_mcp_reads.py:239-252` (MCP tool, suppresses warning), `_engine_support/reads_cli.py:506-516` (`list-epics` CLI subcommand, warns), `schemas/list_epics.schema.json` (deprecated output schema). Replacement: `list_tickets(ticket_type='epic'|'bug', …)`.
- CLI `--verdict-hash` accepted-but-ignored flag `_commands/transition.py:45,94-102`.
- env `REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS` → canonical `REBAR_LLM_*` `llm/config.py:15,363-371`.
- CLI `--no-sync` → `--no-pull` `_engine_support/reads_cli.py:624`.
- cfg value `reconciler.lock_backend="file"` (accept-and-ignore branch) `_config_schema.py:335-336`, `_engine/rebar_reconciler/_advisory_lock.py:100-116`.
- flat-conf key `rebar_id_guard_mode` `config.py:289-300`.

## What
Migrate this repo off each (per the DE7 migrate-first rule), confirm no internal use, then remove the shims/flags/tool/subcommand/schema + update docs and the deprecation registry. Retire the whole `list_epics` family together. Sequence AFTER the registry-completeness ticket adds any missing warnings, so external users had at least one warning release where feasible.

## Scope
User-facing deprecated surface NOT in the DE7 registry seven. Breaking for external consumers (accepted, pre-1.0). Does NOT touch event-schema/on-disk-store back-compat (that is KEEP — see report).

cascade_flag: removes public CLI/MCP/lib entrypoints + a schema — sweep external references; update help text, README, docs, and MCP tool listing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] This repo uses only canonical replacements; repo-wide grep confirms no internal use of the removed surfaces
- [ ] `list_epics` retired across lib + MCP tool + CLI subcommand + output schema
- [ ] `--verdict-hash`, `--no-sync`, `REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS`, flat `rebar_id_guard_mode`, and `lock_backend="file"` removed
- [ ] Deprecation registry + docs + release-notes updated (BREAKING section)
compiled_state.title: Remove uncatalogued user-facing deprecated surfaces pre-beta (list_epics family, --verdict-hash, REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS, ...)
